caption:
...yet this made me want more ❤️‍🩹

Barbed wire ne gear aur mujhe phada - khoon baha aur 3km abhi bhi baaki tha. Us din main bilkul toot gaya tha — physically, mentally. Lekin shayad yahi hota hai jab koi cheez tumhare andar se kuch build karti hai. Toot ke hi toh dekha jaata hai ki kitna dard bardaasht kar sakte ho. Aur usi din ne mujhe zinda rehna sikhaya — taaki agli baar aur bada khel khel sakoon. 🏔️

also wearing my @awara_in nomad tee. 

Aur Awaraon… Part 4 aa raha hai.

#AurAwaraon #Snowboarding #BackcountrySnowboarding #Gulmarg #Kashmir

latestComments.text: I think i just need a good quality mic thats enough for my voice over videos 🤔

caption:
Aur Awaraon… 🏴‍☠️

Backcountry. No groomed slopes. Har run ke liye 30 min ki chadhai.
Pehla din — sirf girna. 3-4 din baad — kuch click hua.

Yahi tha mera snowboarding school. 🏔️

Aur phir main Gulmarg gaya — aur aukaat pata chal gayi. 😅
Iss series mein woh sab aane waala hai. Watch out. 👀

#AurAwaraon #WanderWithSky #Snowboarding

latestComments.text: Thank you for inspiring so much I have done snowboarding because of you . This year I was there in gulmarg jab aap khelo india k time aap waha the couldnt find you but saw your beast Rubicon 🙌🏽😍🫶🏽🫠🫠

caption:
… par iss”Jeene” ko pane mai sabh kuch laga diya. 

Is zindagi ke liye bohot mehnat ki hai —
late nights, early mornings, risks, failures, and starting over more times than I can count.
Kuch bhi easily nahi mila… par shayad isi liye aaj har moment feel hota hai.
Jeena sirf saans lena nahi hota —
yeh woh life build karna hota hai jiske liye tum sab kuch daav pe laga do.

#wanderwithsky #life

caption:
Sethan ne confidence diya aur Gulmarg ne aukaat dikhayi.

Un-learn karo. Re-learn karo. Tabhi pro bante hain. 🏂
Aur Awaraon… ready for part 3?

caption:
